parameter.name: fields
parameter.value:
=account_id,

created_time,
start_time,
stop_time,
updated_time,

id,
name,
bid_adjustments,
bid_amount,
bid_strategy,
billing_event,
budget_remaining,
daily_budget,
lifetime_budget,
effective_status,
issues_info,
objective,
pacing_type,
primary_attribution,
special_ad_category,
topline_id

assignments.name: payload
assignments.value:
={{
{
  campaign_id: $json.id,
  campaign_name: $json.name,
  account_id: ($json.account_id),
  act_account_id: 'act_' + $json.account_id,
  created_time: $json.created_time?.replace('T',' ').substring(0,19),
  start_time: $json.start_time?.replace('T',' ').substring(0,19),
  stop_time: $json.stop_time ? $json.stop_time.replace('T',' ').substring(0,19) : null,
  updated_time: $json.updated_time?.replace('T',' ').substring(0,19),
  budget_remaining: ($json.budget_remaining || 0) / 100,
  daily_budget: ($json.daily_budget || 0) / 100,
  lifetime_budget: ($json.lifetime_budget || 0) / 100,
  effective_status: $json.effective_status,
  pacing_type: $json.pacing_type,
  topline_id: $json.topline_id,
  bid_strategy: $json.bid_strategy,
  objective: $json.objective,
  primary_attribution: $json.primary_attribution,
  special_ad_category: $json.special_ad_category
}
}}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO {{ $('Execute: campaigns').item.json.db_name }}.`mc_campaigns`(`campaign_id`, `campaign_name`, `account_id`, `act_account_id`, `created_time`, `start_time`, `stop_time`, `updated_time`, `budget_remaining`, `daily_budget`, `lifetime_budget`, `effective_status`, `pacing_type`, `topline_id`, `bid_strategy`, `objective`, `primary_attribution`, `special_ad_category`) VALUES (
  {{ $json.payload.campaign_id }},
  {{ $json.payload.campaign_name === null || $json.payload.campaign_name === undefined ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.campaign_name).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.account_id }},
  {{ $json.payload.act_account_id === null || $json.payload.act_account_id === undefined ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.act_account_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.created_time === null || $json.payload.created_time === undefined ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.created_time).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.start_time === null || $json.payload.start_time === undefined ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.start_time).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.stop_time === null || $json.payload.stop_time === undefined || $json.payload.stop_time === '' ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.stop_time).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.updated_time === null || $json.payload.updated_time === undefined ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.updated_time).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.budget_remaining === null || $json.payload.budget_remaining === undefined || $json.payload.budget_remaining === '' ? 0 : $json.payload.budget_remaining }},
  {{ $json.payload.daily_budget === null || $json.payload.daily_budget === undefined || $json.payload.daily_budget === '' ? 0 : $json.payload.daily_budget }},
  {{ $json.payload.lifetime_budget === null || $json.payload.lifetime_budget === undefined || $json.payload.lifetime_budget === '' ? 0 : $json.payload.lifetime_budget }},
  {{ $json.payload.effective_status === null || $json.payload.effective_status === undefined ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.effective_status).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.pacing_type === null || $json.payload.pacing_type === undefined || $json.payload.pacing_type === '' ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.pacing_type).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.topline_id === null || $json.payload.topline_id === undefined || $json.payload.topline_id === '' ? 'NULL' : $json.payload.topline_id }},
  {{ $json.payload.bid_strategy === null || $json.payload.bid_strategy === undefined || $json.payload.bid_strategy === '' ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.bid_strategy).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.objective === null || $json.payload.objective === undefined || $json.payload.objective === '' ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.objective).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.primary_attribution === null || $json.payload.primary_attribution === undefined || $json.payload.primary_attribution === '' ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.primary_attribution).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.payload.special_ad_category === null || $json.payload.special_ad_category === undefined || $json.payload.special_ad_category === '' ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.payload.special_ad_category).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  `campaign_name` = VALUES(`campaign_name`),
  `account_id` = VALUES(`account_id`),
  `act_account_id` = VALUES(`act_account_id`),
  `created_time` = VALUES(`created_time`),
  `start_time` = VALUES(`start_time`),
  `stop_time` = VALUES(`stop_time`),
  `updated_time` = VALUES(`updated_time`),
  `budget_remaining` = VALUES(`budget_remaining`),
  `daily_budget` = VALUES(`daily_budget`),
  `lifetime_budget` = VALUES(`lifetime_budget`),
  `effective_status` = VALUES(`effective_status`),
  `pacing_type` = VALUES(`pacing_type`),
  `topline_id` = VALUES(`topline_id`),
  `bid_strategy` = VALUES(`bid_strategy`),
  `objective` = VALUES(`objective`),
  `primary_attribution` = VALUES(`primary_attribution`),
  `special_ad_category` = VALUES(`special_ad_category`);
